assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Target Branch, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files contain every required section. Task 1: Repository (line 4), Target Branch (line 7), Description (line 10), Files to Create (line 13), Files to Modify (line 16), Implementation Notes (line 19), Acceptance Criteria (line 29), Test Requirements (line 36). Task 2: Repository, Target Branch, Description, Files to Modify, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements all present. Task 3: all sections present including both Files to Create and Files to Modify. Task 4: all sections present with Files to Modify. Task 5: all sections present including both Files to Create and Files to Modify.

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive
assertion_results.evidence: 5 task files found: task-1-add-advisory-severity-summary-model.md, task-2-add-sbom-advisory-summary-service.md, task-3-add-advisory-summary-endpoint.md, task-4-add-cache-invalidation-on-advisory-ingestion.md, task-5-add-advisory-summary-integration-tests.md. 5 is between 3 and 10 inclusive.
All 5 tasks have '## Repository' section containing 'trustify-backend': Task 1 line 4, Task 2 line 4, Task 3 line 4, Task 4 line 4, Task 5 line 4.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG with no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency chain: Task 1 has no dependencies. Task 2 depends on Task 1. Task 3 depends on Task 2. Task 4 depends on Task 3. Task 5 depends on Task 3 and Task 4. This forms an acyclic directed graph: 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5, with 3 -> 5 as an additional edge. No cycles exist.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths plausible within the repo-backend.md structure
assertion_results.evidence: All modified files exist in repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/mod.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/service/sbom.rs, modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/mod.rs, modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs, tests/Cargo.toml. All created files are under existing directories from repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/sbom/model/advisory_summary.rs (under sbom/model/), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/advisory_summary.rs (under sbom/endpoints/), tests/api/advisory_summary.rs (under tests/api/).

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: Impact map lists 6 concrete changes with specific names: 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary response model for severity counts (critical, high, medium, low, total)', 'Add advisory_summary method to SbomService that queries the sbom_advisory join table', 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint with 5-minute cache and 404 handling', 'Support optional ?threshold query parameter', 'Add cache invalidation in the advisory ingestion pipeline', 'Add integration tests for the new endpoint covering success, 404, caching, deduplication, and threshold filtering'. Each describes specific components, endpoints, methods, and behaviors.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 tasks contain a '## Repository' section with exactly 'trustify-backend' as the sole repository name. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.evidence: All 5 tasks contain: '## Target Branch' (set to 'main'), '## Description' (with task-specific content), '## Acceptance Criteria' (with checkbox items), '## Test Requirements' (with checkbox items). Verified in task-1 through task-5.

assertion_results.text: After each task is created, a description digest comment is posted with a real computed SHA-256 hash — exactly 64 lowercase hex characters, not a placeholder (<hex-digest>, <hex>), abbreviated value, or example string. Marker format: '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: sha256:<64-char-hex>'
assertion_results.evidence: No description digest comments found in any output file. Searched all 6 output files (impact-map.md and all 5 task files) for '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest', 'sha256:', 'digest', or 'hash' — none found. No SHA-256 hashes are present anywhere in the outputs.

assertion_results.text: Convention-aware enrichment validates file-type applicability per shared/convention-applicability-rules.md before including a convention — inapplicable conventions are excluded entirely (not listed with 'Not applicable' annotations), and applicable ones include a rationale in the prescribed format ('Applies: task modifies <file> matching the convention's <scope>'), not free-form prose
assertion_results.evidence: No convention-related content found in any output file. Searched all 6 output files for 'CONVENTIONS', 'convention', 'Applies:', 'Per CONVENTIONS' — none found. There is no evidence of convention applicability validation, no convention rationales in prescribed format, and no convention enrichment of any kind in the Implementation Notes or any other section of any task.
